headline: How Apogee, Up 20%, Plans To Take On Rival Regeneron's Eczema Drug
summary: Apogee Therapeutics reported a "best case scenario" Monday for its potential rival to eczema drug, Dupixent.

headline: Eupraxia Pharmaceuticals Boasts $900 Million Peak Sales Potential: Analyst
summary: William Blair starts Eupraxia at Outperform as the analyst flags unmet need and sizable market potential.

headline: Apogee strengthens case for longer-lasting eczema drug
summary: Company shares climbed by more than 20% on Phase 2 study results suggesting the therapy could provide sustained relief when administered once every three or six months.
